entities.name: SORGHUM
entities.description: A cereal grain crop used for seed production programs.

entities.name: PEARL MILLET
entities.description: A cereal grain crop used for seed production programs.

entities.name: SENEGAL
entities.description: A developing country where farmer-based seed production programs have been introduced.

entities.name: NAMIBIA
entities.description: A developing country where farmer-based seed production programs have been introduced.

entities.name: SEED PRODUCTION
entities.description: The process of producing functional and healthy seeds to improve agricultural production.

entities.name: AGRICULTURAL PRODUCTION
entities.description: The overall process of farming and crop yield improvement.

entities.name: IMPROVED CULTIVARS
entities.description: Varieties of crops developed for better performance, including pure-line varieties, composites, and hybrids.

entities.name: PURE-LINE VARIETIES
entities.description: A type of improved cultivar characterized by genetic uniformity.

entities.name: COMPOSITES
entities.description: A type of improved cultivar developed by mixing several varieties.

entities.name: HYBRIDS
entities.description: A type of improved cultivar produced by crossing two different parent lines.

entities.name: BREEDING
entities.description: The process of developing improved cultivars, typically carried out by research stations.

entities.name: COMMERCIAL SEED PRODUCTION
entities.description: The organized operation of producing and distributing seeds for sale.

entities.name: CERTIFICATION
entities.description: The process of monitoring the quality and purity of cultivars by independent agencies.

entities.name: VARIETAL PURITY
entities.description: The quality of maintaining the genetic integrity and absence of mixtures in a crop variety.

entities.name: OPEN-POLLINATED VARIETIES
entities.description: Cultivars that are pollinated by wind or insects, requiring specific seed production procedures.

entities.name: HARVESTING
entities.description: The process of gathering mature crops, which requires precautions to maintain purity.

entities.name: THRESHING
entities.description: The process of separating grain from the husks, which requires precautions to maintain purity.

entities.name: STORAGE
entities.description: The process of keeping seeds until use, which requires precautions to maintain purity.

entities.name: CONTAMINATION
entities.description: The presence of unwanted mixtures or physical impurities that threaten seed quality.
